steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Conditional Download · Theory Conditional Download
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 1854 during a private media entitlement change. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove SdkStream cleanup; bound bytes, time, attempts, promises, streams, concurrency, cache, and spend; then change region, retrieval, or transfer cost and defend the revised budget action. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, map application validators and preconditions to S3 requests and preserve 304, 412, not-found, and version-specific meaning.
